title: NATS JetStream integration not working
description:
### Company or project name
DeepOpinion
### Describe what's wrong
I'm trying to test the integration with NATS JetStream, but it's not working - even though the integration with NATS Core works fine. Same server hostname and port, similar subjects (one is exclusive to a JetStream stream), but when I add a Materialized View to consume the messages from JetStream I only get errors.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
1. Define a `nats_test` stream in NATS JetStream, using subject `nats_test.jetstream`
2. Send a bunch of messages to it via CLI: `nats pub nats_test.jetstream '{"number": {{.Count}}}' --count=1000 --jetstream`
3. After the messages are sent, add the ClickHouse tables/MV:
```
CREATE TABLE nats_test.jetstream_src (number Integer) ENGINE NATS SETTINGS
nats_url = '<your-particular-nats-host>:4222',
nats_subjects = 'nats_test.jetstream',
nats_stream = 'nats_test',
nats_consumer_name = 'nats_test',
nats_format = 'JSONEachRow';
CREATE TABLE nats_test.jetstream_dst (number Integer) ORDER BY number;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW nats_test.jetstream_mv TO nats_test.jetstream_dst AS SELECT * FROM nats_test.jetstream_src;
```
Then, look at the ClickHouse Server logs.
### Expected behavior
I expected the data to be consumed via the Materialized View and sent to the destination table, but it's failing.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
```
clickhouse-server  | 2025.09.23 12:10:12.147588 [ 626 ] {BgMBSchPool::58d20107-5e33-4d6c-b81f-df933848434f} <Error> StorageNATS (nats_test.jetstream_src): Code: 665. DB::Exception: Failed to subscribe consumer 0x742f190ed018 to subject nats_test.jetstream. Error: Not Found . (CANNOT_CONNECT_NATS), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):

clickhouse-server  | 4. DB::NATSJetStreamConsumer::subscribe() @ 0x00000000194185ba
clickhouse-server  | 5. void std::__function::__policy_invoker<void ()>::__call_impl[abi:ne190107]<std::__function::__default_alloc_func<DB::StorageNATS::StorageNATS(DB::StorageID const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, DB::ColumnsDescription const&, String const&, std::unique_ptr<DB::NATSSettings, std::default_delete<DB::NATSSettings>>, DB::LoadingStrictnessLevel)::$_2, void ()>>(std::__function::__policy_storage const*) @ 0x000000001939b1e9
```

### Additional context
I'm using the `head-alpine` container image, while 25.9 hasn't been released yet.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE nats_test.jetstream_src (number INTEGER, message VARCHAR(255), timestamp TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE nats_test.jetstream_dst (number INTEGER, message VARCHAR(255), timestamp TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO nats_test.jetstream_src VALUES (1, 'Test message 1', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (2, 'Test message 2', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (3, 'Test message 3', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE VIEW nats_test.jetstream_mv AS SELECT number, message, timestamp FROM nats_test.jetstream_src WHERE number IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM nats_test.jetstream_dst WHERE timestamp > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
key_bug_features: Materialized View fails to consume messages from NATS JetStream
